items.description:

Thank you so much for your purchase and support ♡

items.name: Tied Medieval Scabbard Belt - Black
items.description:
Tied leather belt of style commonly found in the 12th. to 13th. century. The belt extends to the scabbard itself and is wrapped around it.

Intended to be used in combination with the scabbards, found here:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?CreatorName=Gruppe+G.N.O.&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3
